levels.intro: Level 1: connect each well directly to the platform.
Level 2: manifold unlocked. Use it to reduce total pipeline length.
Level 3: flowline and trunkline now have different prices.
levels.notice: Flowline remains $700/m. Trunkline is now $450/m, so routing wells through manifolds can become cheaper than long direct flowlines.

levels.intro: Level 4: larger field layout with 10 wells.
Level 5: larger field layout with 20 wells.
Level 6: larger field layout with 30 wells.
Level 7: larger field layout with 50 wells.
